title: NOURISHED AND THRIVING CHILDREN: A TRAUMA-INFORMED NUTRITION AND FEEDING COURSE - 211info
text: OREGON STATE UNIVERSITY NOURISHED AND THRIVING CHILDREN: A TRAUMA-INFORMED NUTRITION AND FEEDING COURSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a self-paced 4-hour training on trauma-informed feeding and nutrition. Covers nutrition and mealtime challenges common for children who have experienced trauma and provides guidance on how to address them. 1500 SW Jefferson Way Corvallis, OR 97331 Eligibility: Caregivers with children who have feeding and mealtime challenges Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 737-4197 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 737-4197 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Caregiver Training * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Caregiver Training * Foster Parents Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - OREGON STATE UNIVERSITY EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - COLLEGE ASSISTANCE MIGRANT PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - SOLVE PEST PROBLEMS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE UNIVERSITY
